heading: Transferred
label: 463 Transferred
notes: CodificationSection 463 was editorially reclassified as .section 5103 of this title

Restoration of Vacant and Undisposed-of Ceded Lands in Certain Indian Reservations, , , which provided that lands classified as vacant and undisposed-of ceded lands (including townsite lots) on the Indian reservations at Klamath River, California, Coeur d’Alene, Idaho, Crow, Montana, Fort Peck, Montana, and Spokane, Washington, would be restored to tribal ownership, subject to valid existing rights, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 85–42072 Stat. 121May 19, 1958
